final:
module siso_shift_register (
    input clk,
    input en,
    input serial_in,
    output reg [3:0] q);

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (en) begin
            q <= {serial_in, q[3:1]};
        end
    end
endmodule
